question: Can the replay logic be expressed using real pipeline data at runtime?

signals.classification_label: Composite — depends on hybrid qty + binding replay signals

full-population replay results.json: triggers only when binding + documented combo all true

verdict_rationale: Three documented-combo gates (ocr_qty_eq_1, hybrid_h_qty_2_stable, undiscounted_blank_desc as replayed) are not expressible from a single production extraction without frozen passc/stability/scope artifacts. Binding-derived signals are recomputable from invoice_items only when gross unit_price is preserved; they are never emitted as runtime signals by the pipeline.
